name: Midden-Drenthe (Netherlands)
description: A sea-green field bearing five yellow fleurs-de-lis arranged in the form of a cross.
history: Flag of the municipality of Midden-Drenthe, in the centre of the province of Drenthe, formed in the 1998 reorganisation of the province's municipalities.

features.role: five yellow fleurs-de-lis in a cross arrangement
